productDisplayName: Converse Uniex As Floral Print Ox Brown Shoe
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse was initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into a hot casual footwear favourite.Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Upper with green and blue checks for style Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Synthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fit Midsole Cushioned fabric footbed for comfort and breathability Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Outsole Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Diamond-shaped lugs on the forefoot and heel, with horizontal lugs and grooves on the toe region and heel region, and slanting grooves along the periphery and midfoot for superior grip on all terrains Shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
